question_text: Will Donald Trump and Xi Jinping meet in person before April 3, 2026?
description:

question_text: Will the US and Iran agree to a ceasefire before May 2026?
description:
Tensions between Iran and the US have sharply increased after the October 7, 2023 Hamas attacks, as Israel has [systematically weakened](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iran%E2%80%93Israel_proxy_conflict) Iranian-backed groups including Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis. Israel and Iran exchanged direct strikes in 2024 before fighting [a brief war in June 2025](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Twelve-Day_War), which also included US airstrikes on Iranian nuclear facilities at Fordow, Natanz, and Isfahan.

In December 2025, [protests erupted](https://www.amnesty.org/en/latest/news/2026/01/iran-deaths-injuries-authorities-protest-bloodshed/) across Iran after soaring inflation and worsening living conditions amid a collapse of the Iranian rial. Iranian authorities responded with a severe crackdow

question_text: Will the U.S. conduct a ground invasion of Iran before May 2026?
description:
Relations between the United States and Iran have been adversarial since the [1979 Iranian Revolution](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iranian_Revolution) and the subsequent [Iran hostage crisis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iran_hostage_crisis), which led to the severing of diplomatic relations. Tensions have persisted for decades over Iran’s nuclear program, U.S. sanctions, regional influence, and Iran’s support for armed non-state groups across the Middle East.

As of early March 2026, recent weeks have seen tensions escalate significantly following a series of U.S. military strikes against Iranian targets and related facilities. These actions have been framed by U.S. officials as responses to Iranian activities and attacks by Iran-aligned groups in the region. Iran has condemned the str

question_text: Will the Community beat Nathan Young in the Metaculus Cup Spring 2026?
description:
The Metaculus Cup Spring 2026 launched with a base prize pool of \$5,000. According to the [tournament announcement](https://www.metaculus.com/notebooks/41477/spring-2026-cup-announcement/), an additional \$2,500 will be added to the prize pool if the Community Prediction outperforms Nathan Young, a designated benchmark forecaster, over the course of the tournament.

Specifically, the announcement states that:

> “New this season: the Community Prediction will go head-to-head against Nathan Young… Beat Nathan and an additional \$2,500 gets added to the forecasting prize pool.”

The same announcement also describes Nathan as follows:

question_text: Will shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz return to normal before April 27, 2026?
description:
The [Strait of Hormuz](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Strait_of_Hormuz) is a narrow waterway that connects the Persian Gulf to the ocean, via the Gulf of Oman. The strait is bordered by Iran to the north and Oman and the United Arab Emirates to the south. Due to the amount of oil production in the Persian Gulf, 25% of the world's seaborne oil trade, as well as 20% of the world's liquefied natural gas, and a daily average of [60 ships](https://hormuzstraitmonitor.com/) has historically travelled through the strait. 

On February 28, 2026, Israel and the United States began [a sustained campaign of airstrikes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Iran_war) against Iran, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and attempting to topple the Iranian government. The strikes began a regional war, wi

question_text: Will NASA replace the Space Launch System (SLS) with another launch vehicle for its Artemis missions before 2030?
description:
The [Space Launch System](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Space_Launch_System) (SLS) is NASA's flagship heavy-lift rocket designed for deep space missions, including the Artemis program aimed at returning humans to the Moon. However, the SLS program has faced significant challenges, including delays and high costs. In September 2023, NASA officials [acknowledged](https://www.gao.gov/products/gao-23-105609) that "at current cost levels, the SLS program is unaffordable," prompting discussions about more sustainable alternatives.

The Artemis missions have experienced multiple postponements. For instance, the Artemis III mission, initially planned for 2024, has been delayed to at least 2027 due to technical issues with the Orion spacecraft's heat shield.

Amid these challenges, NASA's Inspector

question_text: Will Romuald Wadagni win the Benin presidential election in April 2026?
description: Benin is [scheduled](https://www.dw.com/en/africa-2026-elections-guide-ethiopia-south-africa-ramaphosa-uganda-zambia/a-75558971) to hold its presidential election on April 12, 2026. The Constitutional Court [approved only two candidates](https://africacenter.org/spotlight/en-elections-2026/): Romuald Wadagni, backed by the ruling coalition (Bloc républicain and Union progressiste le renouveau), and opposition candidate Paul Hounkpè. Wadagni, who previously served as Minister of Economy and Finance, is widely seen as the frontrunner due to the backing of outgoing President Patrice Talon's political machinery.

question_text: Will Anthropic overtake OpenAI in revenue in 2026?
description:
Anthropic and OpenAI are two of the leading AI model developers, seeing very rapid revenue growth driven by API sales, enterprise contracts, and subscriptions.

As of January 2026, [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/openai-cfo-says-annualized-revenue-crosses-20-billion-2025-2026-01-19/) reported that OpenAI’s CFO said the company’s annualized revenue had surpassed \$20 billion in 2025. [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/technology/openai-tops-25-billion-annualized-revenue-last-month-information-reports-2026-03-05/?utm_source=chatgpt.com) later reported that OpenAI had topped \$25 billion in annualized revenue as of February 2026, while Anthropic was at roughly \$9 billion in annualized revenue at that time.

question_text: Will any of these New England comic con events be held during 2026?
description: [Rhode Island Comic Con](https://www.ricomiccon.com) (RICC) is a three-day comic convention held during November at the [Rhode Island Convention Center](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rhode_Island_Convention_Center "Rhode Island Convention Center"), [Amica Mutual Pavilion](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amica_Mutual_Pavilion "Amica Mutual Pavilion"), and [Omni Providence Hotel](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Omni_Providence_Hotel "Omni Providence Hotel") in [Providence, Rhode Island](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Providence,_Rhode_Island "Providence, Rhode Island"). Will the United States attempt to occupy or blockade Kharg Island during 2026?
description:
Kharg Island is an island off the coast of Iran and plays an important role in Iran's oil exports. [The island handles around 90 percent of Iran’s crude oil exports, with approximately 950 million barrels passing through its facilities each year. ](https://www.newarab.com/news/why-kharg-island-matters-irans-strategic-gulf-oil-island)

Since the start of the 2026 Iran War and [closure of the Strait of Hormuz](https://www.reuters.com/graphics/IRAN-CRISIS/OIL-LNG/mopaokxlypa/), [this island has been seen as a potential military target.](https://nypost.com/2026/03/10/us-news/why-the-iran-war-may-come-down-to-the-control-of-one-tiny-island/)

question_text: Will Reza Pahlavi visit Iran during 2026?
description:
[Reza Pahlavi](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reza_Pahlavi), born in Tehran in 1960, is the eldest son of Mohammad Reza Pahlavi, the last Shah of Iran, who was overthrown in the 1979 Islamic Revolution. Pahlavi has lived in exile since the Revolution, which brought Ayatollah Khomeini to power and established the Islamic Republic.

Khamenei, who succeeded Khomeini as Supreme Leader in 1989, held authority over all branches of government, the military, and the judiciary for over three decades. On February 28, 2026, the United States and Israel launched joint military strikes against Iran, resulting in his death.

In the wake of Khamenei's killing, Iran faces deep uncertainty, with possible outcomes including further authoritarian consolidation, prolonged instability, and revolution. Pahlavi h

question_text: Will a 1kt meteor strike take place during March or April 2026?
description:
A [meteoroid](https://science.nasa.gov/solar-system/meteors-meteorites/) is a small object in outer space, typically made out of rock and iron. When a meteoroid enters Earth's atmosphere, it becomes known as a meteor. Though they range in size from microscopic to multi-kilometre asteroids, smaller sizes are more prevalent, with larger objects being exponentially less common.

Space agencies and organisations have long attempted to track meteors entering Earth's atmosphere, with the NASA [Fireball and Bolide database ](https://cneos.jpl.nasa.gov/fireballs/)combining information from across the world.

Since the 1990s, attempts to comprehensively [track space objects](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_near-Earth_object_observation_projects) have dramatically increased, with specific atte

question_text: Will Iran participate in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
description:
Iran was one of the [first non-host nations to qualify](https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/48079937/iran-2026-world-cup-play-happens) for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which is scheduled to begin in June, with games to be played in the United States, Mexico, and Canada. Iran has been placed in Group G and is scheduled to face New Zealand, Belgium, and Egypt — with two group games at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California, and a third at Lumen Field in Seattle.

[On February 28](https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/3/11/iran-cannot-participate-in-the-fifa-world-cup-sports-minister-says), 2026, the United States and Israel launched what Trump described as "major combat operations" against Iran, killing, among others, Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
